concerns.text: Task T035 explicitly forbids Bonferroni/Holm-Bonferroni correction ('NO cross-metric corrections'), directly contradicting spec FR-009 and SC-003 which mandate applying these corrections to control the family-wise error rate. This leaves FR-009 and SC-003 unimplemented.

Tasks T031 and T032 cover Masked SSIM and OCR accuracy, but there is no task implementing FR-010 or measuring the 'Keypoint Matching Score (using SIFT/ORB)' required by spec SC-002 to validate layout preservation independently of texture artifacts.

Tasks T009-T012 describe deriving labels using OCR density, aspect ratio, and edge density heuristics. Spec FR-003 and US-01 explicitly require using 'ground-truth bounding box annotations' from the OmniDoc-TokenBench dataset for evaluation. The tasks do not cover the extraction or usage of the ground-truth labels required for the classifier evaluation in FR-003.

Task T025 performs a threshold sweep to find an 'optimal boundary', but spec FR-008 and SC-005 require reporting the 'variation in false-positive and false-negative rates' across a range of values to confirm robustness. T025's deliverable only mentions the optimal boundary, missing the required sensitivity metrics.

Task T032 mentions 'OCR validation' but does not include the 'manual verification of 10 random samples' fallback mechanism required by spec US-02 Acceptance Scenario 2 if OCR accuracy falls below 95%.
